workflows.name: User submits credentials via Log in
workflows.on_success: redirects teacher to the Dashboard

workflows.name: Unauthenticated user accesses site as a guest
workflows.conditional_branch: User is unauthenticated
workflows.on_success: grants limited unauthenticated browsing of site content

workflows.name: User opens Cookies notice
workflows.on_success: opens cookie usage information

workflows.name: Select timeline time range
workflows.on_success: Timeline refreshes to show items within selected range; if no items exist within the selected range, an empty state is shown.

workflows.name: Change timeline sort order
workflows.on_success: Timeline is reordered according to the selected sort order.

workflows.name: Search the timeline
workflows.on_success: Search results are shown in the timeline; if no items match the query, an empty-state is shown.

workflows.name: Filter calendar by course
workflows.on_success: Calendar events are filtered to the selected course (or show all courses when 'All courses' is selected).

workflows.name: Navigate to previous month in calendar
workflows.on_success: Calendar updates to the previous month; event dates and current-date highlighting refresh to reflect the new month.

workflows.name: Navigate to next month in calendar
workflows.on_success: Calendar updates to the next month; event dates and current-date highlighting refresh to reflect the new month.

workflows.name: Create a new calendar event
workflows.conditional_branch: user_logged_in == true
workflows.on_success: opens calendar event creation flow

workflows.name: Open full calendar view
workflows.conditional_branch: user_logged_in == true
workflows.on_success: navigates to dedicated calendar view

workflows.name: Open calendar import/export management
workflows.conditional_branch: user_logged_in == true
workflows.on_success: opens calendar data management

workflows.name: Reset page to default (while in Edit mode)
workflows.conditional_branch: Edit_Mode == on
workflows.on_success: reverts layout to default for the user

workflows.name: Open Add a block page (while in Edit mode)
workflows.conditional_branch: Edit_Mode == on
workflows.on_success: opens Add_A_Block_Page

workflows.name: Cancel from Add a block page
workflows.on_success: returns to the Dashboard without adding a block

workflows.name: Move a block using the move icon (row-level)
workflows.conditional_branch: Edit_Mode == on AND Blocks.Move_Icon
workflows.on_success: initiates block repositioning; layout changes persisted for the user

workflows.name: Configure a block via options menu (row-level)
workflows.conditional_branch: Edit_Mode == on AND Blocks.Options_Menu.Configure
workflows.on_success: opens configuration controls for the selected block

workflows.name: Move a block via options menu (row-level)
workflows.conditional_branch: Edit_Mode == on AND Blocks.Options_Menu.Move
workflows.on_success: initiates block repositioning; layout changes persisted for the user

workflows.name: Delete a block via options menu (row-level)
workflows.conditional_branch: Edit_Mode == on AND Blocks.Options_Menu.Delete
workflows.on_success: removes the block from the dashboard; layout changes persisted for the user

workflows.name: Open course via Course Name link
workflows.on_success: Navigates to Course Main Page

workflows.name: Open course via card click
workflows.on_success: Navigates to Course Main Page

workflows.name: Star a course from card actions
workflows.on_success: pins the course to the top of the list

workflows.name: Remove a course from view from card actions
workflows.on_success: hides the course from the user's view without affecting enrollment

workflows.name: Navigate to section via Course Index
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the selected section in the course content (Course Index sidebar link activates the section view).

workflows.name: Toggle a single section (expand/collapse)
workflows.on_success: The targeted section toggles between expanded and collapsed states; its activities and resources are shown or hidden accordingly.

workflows.name: Collapse all sections
workflows.on_success: All course content sections collapse so only section headers remain visible.

workflows.name: Open an activity from a section
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the selected activity (opens the activity page or view).

workflows.name: Open a resource from a section
workflows.on_success: Navigates to or opens the selected resource.

modules.module_title: Course Edit Mode and Activity Chooser

workflows.name: Section inline quick rename
workflows.on_success: Section renamed inline.

workflows.name: Section menu - edit
workflows.on_success: section edit selected (edit action invoked for section)

workflows.name: Section menu - duplicate
workflows.on_success: section duplicated

workflows.name: Section menu - hide
workflows.on_success: section hidden

workflows.name: Section menu - delete
workflows.on_success: section deleted

workflows.name: Section menu - move
workflows.on_success: section move initiated

workflows.name: Add an activity or resource (open chooser)
workflows.on_success: opens Activity_Chooser_Modal

workflows.name: Add a subsection
workflows.on_success: subsection added

workflows.name: Activity inline quick rename
workflows.on_success: Activity renamed inline.

workflows.name: Activity menu - edit settings
workflows.on_success: activity settings edit selected (opens activity settings)

workflows.name: Activity menu - move
workflows.on_success: activity move initiated

workflows.name: Activity menu - duplicate
workflows.on_success: activity duplicated

workflows.name: Activity menu - hide
workflows.on_success: activity hidden

workflows.name: Activity menu - set access restrictions
workflows.on_success: activity access restrictions selected (opens access restrictions dialog)

workflows.name: Activity menu - delete
workflows.on_success: activity deleted

workflows.name: Bulk action - Delete Selected
workflows.conditional_branch: one or more Select_For_Bulk == true
workflows.on_success: selected activities deleted

workflows.name: Bulk action - Move Selected
workflows.conditional_branch: one or more Select_For_Bulk == true
workflows.on_success: move selected activities initiated

workflows.name: Bulk action - Duplicate Selected
workflows.conditional_branch: one or more Select_For_Bulk == true
workflows.on_success: selected activities duplicated

workflows.name: Bulk action - Hide Selected
workflows.conditional_branch: one or more Select_For_Bulk == true
workflows.on_success: selected activities hidden

workflows.name: Bulk action - Set access restrictions
workflows.conditional_branch: one or more Select_For_Bulk == true
workflows.on_success: access restrictions set for selected activities

workflows.name: Activity tile favorite toggle
workflows.on_success: activity tile favorite state toggled

workflows.name: Activity Chooser Add - Assignment selected
workflows.conditional_branch: Activity_Tiles.Select == Assignment
workflows.on_success: opens selected activity creation form

workflows.name: Activity Chooser Add - Forum selected
workflows.conditional_branch: Activity_Tiles.Select == Forum
workflows.on_success: opens selected activity creation form

workflows.name: Activity Chooser Add - Quiz selected
workflows.conditional_branch: Activity_Tiles.Select == Quiz
workflows.on_success: opens selected activity creation form

workflows.name: Activity Chooser Add - File selected
workflows.conditional_branch: Activity_Tiles.Select == File
workflows.on_success: opens selected activity creation form

workflows.name: Activity Chooser Add - Page selected
workflows.conditional_branch: Activity_Tiles.Select == Page
workflows.on_success: opens selected activity creation form

workflows.name: Activity Chooser Add - Lesson selected
workflows.conditional_branch: Activity_Tiles.Select == Lesson
workflows.on_success: opens selected activity creation form

workflows.name: Activity Chooser Add - SCORM selected
workflows.conditional_branch: Activity_Tiles.Select == SCORM
workflows.on_success: opens selected activity creation form

workflows.name: Activity Chooser Add - URL selected
workflows.conditional_branch: Activity_Tiles.Select == URL
workflows.on_success: opens selected activity creation form

workflows.name: Activity Chooser Add - Workshop selected
workflows.conditional_branch: Activity_Tiles.Select == Workshop
workflows.on_success: opens selected activity creation form

workflows.name: Save and return — File_Submissions=false; Group_Submissions=false; Add_Restriction_Button_Clicked=false
workflows.conditional_branch: File_Submissions == false AND Group_Submissions == false AND Add_Restriction_Button_Clicked == false
workflows.on_success: creates the assignment and redirects to the course page

workflows.name: Save and display — File_Submissions=false; Group_Submissions=false; Add_Restriction_Button_Clicked=false
workflows.conditional_branch: File_Submissions == false AND Group_Submissions == false AND Add_Restriction_Button_Clicked == false
workflows.on_success: creates the assignment and opens the new assignment's page

workflows.name: Cancel — File_Submissions=false; Group_Submissions=false; Add_Restriction_Button_Clicked=false
workflows.conditional_branch: File_Submissions == false AND Group_Submissions == false AND Add_Restriction_Button_Clicked == false
workflows.on_success: discards all changes

workflows.name: Save and return — File_Submissions=true; Group_Submissions=false; Add_Restriction_Button_Clicked=false
workflows.conditional_branch: File_Submissions == true AND Group_Submissions == false AND Add_Restriction_Button_Clicked == false

workflows.name: Save with End Date enabled and Topics format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == true AND Course_Format == Topics format
workflows.on_success: persists configuration and returns to course page

workflows.name: Cancel with End Date enabled and Topics format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == true AND Course_Format == Topics format
workflows.on_success: abandons changes and returns to course page

workflows.name: Save with End Date disabled and Topics format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == false AND Course_Format == Topics format
workflows.on_success: persists configuration and returns to course page

workflows.name: Cancel with End Date disabled and Topics format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == false AND Course_Format == Topics format
workflows.on_success: abandons changes and returns to course page

workflows.name: Save with End Date enabled and Weekly format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == true AND Course_Format == Weekly format
workflows.on_success: persists configuration and returns to course page

workflows.name: Cancel with End Date enabled and Weekly format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == true AND Course_Format == Weekly format
workflows.on_success: abandons changes and returns to course page

workflows.name: Save with End Date disabled and Weekly format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == false AND Course_Format == Weekly format
workflows.on_success: persists configuration and returns to course page

workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == false AND Course_Format == Weekly format
workflows.on_success: abandons changes and returns to course page

workflows.name: Save with End Date enabled and Other format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == true AND Course_Format == Other
workflows.on_success: persists configuration and returns to course page

workflows.name: Cancel with End Date enabled and Other format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == true AND Course_Format == Other
workflows.on_success: abandons changes and returns to course page

workflows.name: Save with End Date disabled and Other format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == false AND Course_Format == Other
workflows.on_success: persists configuration and returns to course page

workflows.name: Cancel with End Date disabled and Other format
workflows.conditional_branch: Course_End_Date_Enable == false AND Course_Format == Other
workflows.on_success: abandons changes and returns to course page

workflows.name: Apply filters
workflows.on_success: Filters applied; participants list updated to match filters

workflows.name: Clear filters
workflows.on_success: Filters cleared; participants list reset to default

workflows.name: Add another filter condition
workflows.on_success: Adds a new condition row to the filter builder

workflows.name: Open enrol users dialog
workflows.on_success: Opens the Enrol users dialog

workflows.name: Confirm enrollment in Enrol users dialog
workflows.on_success: adds the user to the course at the specified role

workflows.name: View participant profile (row or name link)
workflows.on_success: Participant's profile opened

workflows.name: Edit participant role
workflows.on_success: Participant's role editor opened

workflows.name: Send message to participant
workflows.on_success: Message composer opened for the selected participant

workflows.name: Open bulk actions for selected users
workflows.on_success: Bulk actions menu opened for selected users

workflows.name: Open grading interface via Grade button
workflows.on_success: opens grading interface

workflows.name: Search by student name
workflows.on_success: Table is filtered to match the student search query, narrowing visible submissions.

workflows.name: Filter by submission status
workflows.on_success: Table is filtered by the selected Submission Status (e.g., Submitted for grading, No submission, Draft — not submitted).

workflows.name: Filter by grading status
workflows.on_success: Table is filtered by the selected Grading Status (Graded or Not graded).

workflows.name: Enable Quick Grading mode
workflows.on_success: Quick Grading Mode enabled; inline grade entry (Final_Grade) becomes editable directly in the table.

workflows.name: Open student profile from row
workflows.on_success: Link opens the student's profile.

workflows.name: Open online text preview
workflows.on_success: Opens an inline preview of the student's online text submission.

workflows.name: Open submitted files
workflows.on_success: Links to submitted files are opened for download or viewing.

workflows.name: Open submission comments
workflows.on_success: Opens the submission comments thread or modal.

workflows.name: Open or add feedback comments
workflows.on_success: Opens or allows adding feedback comments for the submission.

workflows.name: Open feedback files
workflows.on_success: Links to feedback files are opened for download or viewing.

workflows.name: Open grading workflow for a student
workflows.on_success: Opens the grading workflow for the selected student.

workflows.name: Edit final grade inline (Quick Grading enabled)
workflows.conditional_branch: Quick_Grading_Mode == true
workflows.on_success: Final grade is edited inline in the table when Quick Grading Mode is enabled.

workflows.name: Open activity grade settings from column header
workflows.on_success: opens activity's grade settings

workflows.name: Edit an individual grade from a cell
workflows.on_success: opens grade edit dialog for the selected cell

workflows.name: Save inline edits in Edit mode
workflows.conditional_branch: Edit_Mode_Toggle == true
workflows.on_success: applies inline grade edits

workflows.name: Open messaging composer via Message button
workflows.on_success: Opens the messaging composer / messaging interface

workflows.name: Navigate to Edit profile
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the Edit profile page

workflows.name: View Data retention summary
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the Data retention summary page

workflows.name: Open an associated course profile from Course list
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the associated course profile page

workflows.name: Open Blog entries
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the Blog entries list/page

workflows.name: Open Forum posts
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the Forum posts list/page

workflows.name: Open Forum discussions
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the Forum discussions list/page

workflows.name: Open Learning plans
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the Learning plans page

workflows.name: View Browser sessions report
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the Browser sessions page

workflows.name: View Grades overview report
workflows.on_success: Navigates to the Grades overview page

workflows.name: Update profile (save changes)
workflows.on_success: refreshes the profile page

workflows.name: Cancel edit (discard changes)
workflows.on_success: exits without making changes

workflows.name: User initiates logout via Log out button
workflows.on_success: Terminates the current authenticated session and redirects the user to the login page; access to protected pages requires re-authentication.
